programme.title: Police Academy 3: Back in Training
programme.desc: Slapstick farce with the incompetent cops as they set about saving their beloved academy from closure. Cutbacks mean that only one of the two police training schools can stay open, so Commandant Lassard appeals to the motley crew of graduates to come and train new recruits. However, the rival academy intends to sabotage their plans by cutting their training time down to a minimum.

programme.title: Miss Congeniality
programme.desc: An uncouth FBI agent goes undercover in the Miss United States beauty pageant as a contestant to flush out a terrorist who plans to bomb the event. The hard-nosed cop, who prides herself on her toughness, must discard her trainers and feminise her behaviour if she is to avoid blowing her cover.

programme.title: Ace Ventura: Pet Detective
programme.desc: Tale about an unconventional sleuths attempts to find a football teams stolen mascot dolphin. The Miami Dolphins are aghast when their beloved Snowflake is abducted one week before the all-important Super Bowl, so they call in Ace Ventura, a private eye who uses unorthodox methods to retrieve missing animals.

programme.title: Ace Ventura: When Nature Calls
programme.desc: Sequel about the zany private detective who specialises in locating missing pets. Ace Ventura travels to Africa to search for a kidnapped sacred albino bat, which reputedly has the power to restore peace between two warring tribes.

programme.title: Little Fockers
programme.desc: Greg and Pam have been together for ten years, and now theyre the proud parents of two adorable twins. However, money is tight and in order to keep his family afloat, devoted nurse Greg takes a second job working for a drug company. That development doesnt sit well with Jack, whose previous suspicions regarding his hapless son-in-law soon come back in full force after learning of this development.

programme.title: Love Actually
programme.desc: Weaving in and out of the love lives of eight loosely inter-related couples. The bachelor Prime Minister falls for his personal assistant, his brother-in-law is flirting with one of his colleagues, a writer heads off to France and pursues an affair with a maid, and an 11-year-old boy asks his father for advice on matters of the heart.

programme.title: Hope Springs
programme.desc: A woman drags her skeptical husband to a renowned counsellors marriage retreat to try to put the spark back in their relationship.

programme.title: Ace Ventura: When Nature Calls
programme.desc: Sequel about the zany private detective who specialises in locating missing pets. Ace Ventura travels to Africa to search for a kidnapped sacred albino bat, which reputedly has the power to restore peace between two warring tribes.

programme.title: Billy Madison
programme.desc: Billy is the son of hotel chain magnate Brian Madison and expects to inherit the family fortune, but hes shocked when his father stipulates he wont unless he passes 12th grade in just 24 weeks. It will be tough, since he never passed 1st grade. Determined to prove his father wrong, Billy enrols at school.

programme.title: Miss Congeniality 2: Armed and Fabulous
programme.desc: FBI agent Gracie is given another makeover to become the face of the Bureau, prior to embarking on a promotional tour. When two of her friends are kidnapped - Miss USA and a beauty pageant director - she decides to investigate on her own, in defiance of orders to the contrary.

programme.title: Miss Congeniality 2: Armed and Fabulous
programme.desc: FBI agent Gracie is given another makeover to become the face of the Bureau, prior to embarking on a promotional tour. When two of her friends are kidnapped - Miss USA and a beauty pageant director - she decides to investigate on her own, in defiance of orders to the contrary.

programme.title: The Survivor
programme.desc: After being sent to Auschwitz, Haft is forced to participate in a gladiatorial boxing spectacle along with his fellow prisoners.

programme.title: Cicada
programme.desc: Ben, a young bisexual man, comes out to the world and develops an intense relationship with Sam, a closeted man struggling with deep wounds of his own. As summer progresses and their intimacy grows, secrets from the past come to light.

programme.title: A Mistake
programme.desc: A surgeon allows her young colleague to take charge during a surgery. When a mistake occurs, the surgeon finds herself in a difficult situation.

programme.title: The Room Next Door
programme.desc: Ingrid and Martha became close friends while working together at the same magazine. After years of being out of touch, they meet again in an extreme but strangely sweet situation.

programme.title: The Survivor
programme.desc: After being sent to Auschwitz, Haft is forced to participate in a gladiatorial boxing spectacle along with his fellow prisoners.

programme.title: Footloose
programme.desc: Chicago teen Ren and his family move to the small midwestern town of Bomont, where rock music has been banned.

programme.title: Chicago
programme.desc: Roxy Hart is sent to prison for shooting her lying lover. In prison she meets tabloid darling and headline singer, Velma Kelly, who is also in for a double murder. With the help of a slick Chicago lawyer, she learns to play the media game and vies for the valuable press attention that will get her out of jail.

programme.title: The Bodyguard
programme.desc: A Secret Service agent-turned-bodyguard finds danger and romance while protecting an entertainer from a stalker.

programme.title: A Star Is Born
programme.desc: Hard-drinking country music star Jackson Maine discovers, and falls in love with, a struggling but talented singer named Ally. As her career quickly takes off, Jackson starts to realize that his best days may be behind him.

programme.title: Coach Carter
programme.desc: Based on the true story of Coach Ken Carter, a controversial high school basketball coach who received national attention when he benched his undefeated team due to their collective poor academic record in 1999. In the face of much criticism, Carter fought to keep his methods, determined to show the boys that they need to rely on more than sports for their futures.

programme.title: Skincare
programme.desc: A famed aesthetician faces a new challenge when a rival opens a skin care boutique directly across from her store. Suspecting that someone is trying to sabotage her, she embarks on a quest to unravel the mystery of whos trying to destroy her life.

programme.title: Skincare
programme.desc: A famed aesthetician faces a new challenge when a rival opens a skin care boutique directly across from her store. Suspecting that someone is trying to sabotage her, she embarks on a quest to unravel the mystery of whos trying to destroy her life.

programme.title: The Shamrock Spitfire
programme.desc: The youngest wing commander in the history of the Royal Air Force, 21-year-old Brendan Spitfire Paddy Finucane became one of the most celebrated fighter aces of the Second World War.

programme.title: The Hobbit: The Desolation of Smaug
Cats and Dogs: The Revenge of Kitty Galore
programme.desc: The canine and feline species join forces to thwart the evil plans of Kitty Galore who dreams of global domination.

programme.title: Small Foot
programme.desc: Migo is a friendly Yeti who discovers something that he didnt know existed: a human. When his fellow villagers refuse to believe him, Migo embarks on an epic journey to find the mysterious creature that can put him back in good graces.

programme.title: A Dogs Purpose
programme.desc: Reincarnated as different dogs over the course of five decades, a lovable and devoted canine keeps reuniting with the original owner who cared for it as a golden retriever puppy.

programme.title: The Wild Robot
programme.desc: Shipwrecked on a deserted island, a robot named Roz must learn to adapt to its new surroundings. Building relationships with the native animals, Roz soon develops a parental bond with an orphaned gosling.

programme.title: The Wizard of Oz
programme.desc: Perennial family favourite about Dorothy, a young girl from the American Midwest, who is swept by a cyclone to a magical kingdom over the rainbow. There she meets a scarecrow, a tin man and a cowardly lion, who join her on a quest to find the all-powerful Wizard of Oz, the only man who can help her get back to to Kansas. However, the Wicked Witch of the West has other plans for Dorothy and her new friends.

programme.title: The Hobbit: The Battle of the Five Armies
programme.desc: After the dwarves find and awaken Smaug the dragon, a battle arises to gain control of Erebor and the vast treasure inside. Meanwhile, Bilbo Baggins is in possession of a mysterious and magical ring.

programme.title: Cats and Dogs: The Revenge of Kitty Galore
programme.desc: The canine and feline species join forces to thwart the evil plans of Kitty Galore who dreams of global domination.

programme.title: Stuart Little
programme.desc: A New York couple go to an orphanage to adopt a brother for their only son, but instead come away with a little mouse. On arrival at his new home, the diminutive rodent receives a lukewarm welcome by the boy - and an even frostier reception from the pet cat. Featuring a mixture of live action and animation.

programme.title: Stuart Little 2
programme.desc: Sequel to the childrens story about the adventures of a small mouse, blending live action and computer-animated characters. The eponymous hero befriends a tiny bird wounded by a sinister falcon, but he must enlist the help of the dreaded family cat if he is to protect his new-found friend.

programme.title: Stardust
programme.desc: In a countryside town bordering on a magical land, a young man ventures into the realm of fairies to retrieve a fallen star in order to win the heart of his beloved.

programme.title: The Hobbit: The Battle of the Five Armies
programme.desc: After the dwarves find and awaken Smaug the dragon, a battle arises to gain control of Erebor and the vast treasure inside. Meanwhile, Bilbo Baggins is in possession of a mysterious and magical ring.

programme.title: The Wild Robot
programme.desc: Shipwrecked on a deserted island, a robot named Roz must learn to adapt to its new surroundings. Building relationships with the native animals, Roz soon develops a parental bond with an orphaned gosling.

programme.title: Harold and the Purple Crayon
programme.desc: Inside his book, Harold can make anything come to life simply by drawing it. After he grows up and draws himself off the books pages and into the real world, he learns his trusty crayon can set off more hilarious hijinks than he thought possible.

programme.title: Harold and the Purple Crayon
programme.desc: Inside his book, Harold can make anything come to life simply by drawing it. After he grows up and draws himself off the books pages and into the real world, he learns his trusty crayon can set off more hilarious hijinks than he thought possible.

programme.title: The Krays
programme.desc: The disturbing story of the making of the infamous 60s underworld figures Reggie and Ronnie Kray - from their upbringing by a domineering mother in the deprivation of Londons East End. The gangland empire they build is characterised by violence and intimidation, and the film is unflinching in its depiction of their rise to power.

programme.title: Love Story
programme.desc: A wealthy law student and a lower-class music student meet and fall in love while at Harvard. In the face of parental disapproval, they marry and are blissfully happy, until they discover that she has a fatal disease.

programme.title: Legends of the Fall
programme.desc: Sweeping epic about three sons raised on a Montana ranch by their father, a colonel who has turned his back on the army after the Indian Wars. Though the destinies of the boys are very different, two forces impact on each of their lives: the Great War in Europe and the love of a young woman. Covering several decades, the action ranges from majestic Montana to the battlefields of Europe and adventure on the high seas.

programme.title: Terms of Endearment
programme.desc: While widow Aurora fends off a stream of admirers, daughter Emma learns the hard facts of married life.

programme.title: Little Women
programme.desc: Marmee is the head of the March household in the absence of her husband, whos away fighting in the US Civil War. Her daughters range from the headstrong Jo and sweet Beth, to domesticated Meg and wilful Amy. The film follows the trials and tribulations of the girls, from early poverty and tragedy to Jos later efforts to secure both a husband and a successful writing career, and Amys relationship with an old family friend.

programme.title: Escape to Victory
programme.desc: When ex-German international and camp commandant Van Steiner suggests a match between the POWs and the Germans, it swiftly escalates into a propaganda exercise.

programme.title: Legends of the Fall
programme.desc: Sweeping epic about three sons raised on a Montana ranch by their father, a colonel who has turned his back on the army after the Indian Wars. Though the destinies of the boys are very different, two forces impact on each of their lives: the Great War in Europe and the love of a young woman. Covering several decades, the action ranges from majestic Montana to the battlefields of Europe and adventure on the high seas.

programme.title: Critters
programme.desc: Hilarity and horror ensue when toothy, carnivorous aliens escape from their space prison, pursued by two merciless bounty hunters. When they reach the Kansas farmhouse of an all-American family, the humans do everything they can to fend off the critters, but they cannot free themselves of the ferocious outsiders.

programme.title: Mad Max
programme.desc: In a desolate near future, vicious motorcycle gangs roam the wastelands attacking what is left of civilisation. With law and order in chaos, a tough police patrolman enforces a new kind of law - cold-blooded revenge - when his family is murdered by one of the gangs.

programme.title: Mad Max 2: The Road Warrior
programme.desc: Fast-paced apocalyptic adventure. In a hostile post-World War III world, petrol is the most precious commodity and people will do anything to get it. Embittered lone warrior Max agrees to help when an oil-producing community comes under attack from a violent gang determined to get its hands on their fuel.

programme.title: Mad Max 3: Beyond Thunderdome
programme.desc: Set in a lawless, post-apocalyptic wilderness. To retrieve his camel train, hero Max enters the seedy, savage, rough-hewn precincts of Bartertown. Forced to fight for his possessions, he breaks the only rule of the city and is banished. In the desert, he is rescued by a tribe of feral children who see him as a prophesied saviour.

programme.title: Seven
programme.desc: Two detectives are in search of a serial killer who seems to be exacting retribution for the seven deadly sins. In his final week on the force, veteran Detective William Somerset is drawn back into the decay of the city as he and Detective David Mills, his cocky replacement, hunt the maniac.

programme.title: Sleepers
programme.desc: Eleven years after their horrific experiences at reform school, Tommy Marcano and John Reilly have become two-bit American gangsters, Lorenzo Carcaterra is a reporter and Michael Sullivan an assistant DA. The four are reunited when they chance across one of the abusive guards and take the chance for revenge.

programme.title: Sleepers

programme.desc: Axel Foley and his Beverly Hills buddies investigate criminal activities at a Southern California amusement park.

programme.title: The Karate Kid
programme.desc: A new kid at a school makes the mistake of dating the ex-girlfriend of the school bully, whose gang then make his life a misery. He then bumps into a handyman who also happens to be a karate master. The handyman teaches him martial arts and he eventually meets up with his tormentors at a tournament, but will they fight fair?

programme.title: The Karate Kid Part II
programme.desc: Old rivalries and new adversaries await Daniel and Miyagi as they travel to Okinawa to visit Miyagis ailing father.

programme.title: The Karate Kid Part III
programme.desc: A boy trained in the martial arts is alienated from his mentor just when he needs to prepare for a showdown with his arch-enemy. Instead, he turns to a Vietnam vet who teaches him how to fight dirty - a strategy the youth comes to realise is a mistake.

programme.title: Bridget Joness Diary
programme.desc: A neurotic thirty-something resolves to take control of her life once and for all. She drinks, smokes and eats too much, and, worst of all, she falls for the wrong kind of man - passing over Mr Right for Mr Right Now. From the novel by Helen Fielding.

programme.title: Bridget Jones: The Edge of Reason
programme.desc: Bridgets brand new relationship with Darcy has taken a plummet due to her jealousy of his workmate. Having previously left the publishing house she worked for to avoid her boss, Daniel, with whom she had an unsuccessful romance, she finds him along for the ride on her new job, which takes her to Thailand, and almost into his arms.

programme.title: Bridget Joness Baby
programme.desc: Befuddled mom-to-be Bridget Jones must figure out which of the two men in her life is the father of her child.

programme.title: Spider-Man
programme.desc: Adaptation of the adventures of the swinging comic-strip hero. A shy student becomes a crime fighter after a bite from a mutant spider, during a school outing, gives him extraordinary powers. As he comes to terms with his new-found abilities, he is also forced to contend with a maniac villain known as the Green Goblin.

programme.title: Spider-Man 2
programme.desc: The comic book web-slinger returns for a blockbusting sequel. Crime-fighting has cost Peter Parker his best friend and his true love Mary Jane. However, just as he quits as Spider-Man, New York comes under threat from Dr Octopus, a metal-tentacled madman. Peter has no choice but to swing back into action.

programme.title: Spider-Man 3
programme.desc: Life is sweet for Peter Parker, MJ loves him, her career is taking off and Spidey-mania is sweeping New York. However, when an alien parasite bonds to his suit, its not long before the good times and Spidey turn bad. While his ugly ego is taking centre stage, MJ is dumped from her Broadway show, Harry remembers Spider-Mans role in his fathers death, and Peter is consumed by revenge.

programme.title: American Historys Biggest Fibs with Lucy Worsley
programme.desc: Lucy Worsley reveals the historic myths and deceptions told following the United States emergence as a superpower after the Second World War. The 1950s and early 1960s in America are often remembered as a golden era of abundance, harmony and the American dream made real. This film reveals that to be a carefully constructed illusion.

programme.title: Agatha Christie Mystery Queen
programme.desc: Historian Lucy Worsley investigates the complex factors that shaped the dark imagination of a refined Devonshire lady, discovering family secrets and a childhood haunted by a sinister figure.

programme.title: American Historys Biggest Fibs with Lucy Worsley
programme.desc: Lucy Worsley examines the American Revolution, a David-and-Goliath battle of men with high ideals taking on the might of the British Empire, and asks how much of Americas founding story is based on fact.

programme.title: Great Coastal Railway Journeys
programme.desc: Beginning on the Moray Firth, Michael admires the impressive Cullen viaduct before enjoying a bowl of Cullen skink at a family-run fishmonger of 150 years standing. Heading west along the firth, Michael reaches Forres Station and the seaside village of Findhorn, where he meets members of an eco-community founded in the 1960s. At the Findhorn Foundation, Michael discovers spiritual energy, sacred dancing and a history of very large vegetables.

programme.title: Martin Clunes: Islands of America
programme.desc: From space, the US appears as we know it to be - an immense single land mass hemmed between the planets two greatest oceans. Look a little closer, however, and you notice something else; along its coastline, float countless islands.

programme.title: Martin Clunes: Islands of America
programme.desc: Martin Clunes goes on a journey around the coast of America to discover what life is like on the surrounding islands. He travels from Hawaiis islands of fire and Alaskas islands of snow, to the playgrounds of presidents off the New England coast.

programme.title: Last of the Summer Wine
programme.sub-title: Will Howard Cross the Atlantic Single-Handed?
programme.desc: Hobbo is still having trouble getting Nelly to admit that she is his natural birth mother. programme.title: Not Going Out
programme.desc: A new neighbour moves in upstairs, and his constant noise drives Lucy to distraction. She begs Lee and Tim to get him to stop, but neither is man enough. Tim takes being branded a coward to heart, and rushes off to join a boxing gym. Lee, meanwhile, tries to impress Lucy by confronting the man in his own flat, where he finds himself staring into the eyes of a cold killer.

programme.sub-title: The Mother of All Mistakes - Or Is It?
programme.desc: Adopted as a baby, former milkman and undercover secret agent Hobbo is determined to trace his natural mother. Meanwhile, Howard is in trouble when Marina, upon finding out that he has been making enquiries about another woman, turns up at his house.

programme.title: Last of the Summer Wine
programme.sub-title: Will Howard Cross the Atlantic Single-Handed?
programme.desc: Hobbo is still having trouble getting Nelly to admit that she is his natural birth mother. programme.desc: A new neighbour moves in upstairs, and his constant noise drives Lucy to distraction. She begs Lee and Tim to get him to stop, but neither is man enough. programme.title: 999: Rescue Squad
programme.desc: The medics spring into action when a cyclist plunges down a cliff in a freak accident. A homeowners booby trap, designed to deter burglars, sparks a major rescue operation.

programme.title: Annika
programme.desc: Annika and the team are tasked with solving the death of a man that was seemingly loved by everyone he met. However it seemed that someone hated him as he was thrown in the river from a party boat.

programme.title: Annika
programme.desc: A young woman murdered on the Glasgow docks hits the team hard when Michaels brother is named as the next of kin. Michael is taken off the case while his brother is investigated.

programme.desc: Baz Ashmawy and his team set out to renovate the homes of deserving families, changing their lives forever - but with only 9 days to transform each home.

programme.title: Louis Theroux Interviews...
programme.desc: Louis spends time with platinum-selling rapper Stormzy. After two years out of the spotlight, Stormzy welcomes Louis into his home in south west London to sit down for a frank and revealing conversation that covers many aspects of his life, from his childhood to the breakdown of a high-profile relationship, as well as the pressures that come with being one of the countrys best-loved musicians and role models.

programme.title: The Supervet
programme.desc: Tina and her boisterous sons bring in their springer spaniel puppy who has a badly deformed hind leg that requires complicated surgery. Professor Fitzpatrick also receives two-year-old cat Lily who drags one of her back legs.

programme.title: The Supervet
programme.desc: Karen suffers from frequent nocturnal epileptic fits. Her Staffordshire Bull Terrier Pearl has the extraordinary ability to sense when these episodes are about to happen. But Pearl has problems with her knees and is unable to walk without pain.

programme.title: DIY SOS: The Big Build
programme.desc: Homeowners across Britain try to complete do-it-yourself home projects on their own. But sometimes, they need help finishing the work. Thats where presenter Nick Knowles and his team of designers and builders step in. They help homeowners complete their DIY projects gone awry.

programme.desc: Homeowners across Britain try to complete do-it-yourself home projects on their own. But sometimes, they need help finishing the work. Thats where presenter Nick Knowles and his team of designers and builders step in. They help homeowners complete their DIY projects gone awry.

programme.title: Pete Wicks: For Dogs Sake
programme.sub-title: Terri, Esme and the Chi Family
programme.desc: Pete meets the four-legged friends that call the UKs leading dog welfare charity, Dogs Trust, home. From when they are rescued, Pete plays an instrumental role in their rehabilitation process, right up until the point the dogs are safely rehomed.

programme.title: One Born Every Minute
programme.desc: This edition features two couples who have stuck together despite the challenges life has thrown at them. Ryan started dating Keely when they were both at school, but to their shock Keely fell pregnant very quickly. Katie says she is the grown up in the relationship and her fiance Steve is like a child. In the delivery suite, Steve is on form constantly mucking about and generally driving Katie up the wall.

programme.title: One Born Every Minute
programme.desc: Leah is having her sixth baby but unfortunately her partner is in prison and will miss the birth. Meanwhile, Becky met Police Sergeant John one Halloween when he was dressed as a witch and it was love at first sight. Within weeks they were engaged and trying for the child theyd both always wanted.

programme.title: Emergency: First Time Medics
programme.desc: Its a day of firsts for the junior doctors. Claire confronts her fears with her first child patient, Tejas steps up to his first trauma case, and Adrian faces his first chest drain.

programme.title: Emergency: First Time Medics
programme.desc: Its the Reading Festival and the junior doctors have no idea whats in store, from a possible drug overdose to a mosh pit injury.

programme.title: DIY SOS: The Big Build Ireland
programme.desc: Baz Ashmawy and the team focus on rehousing Ukrainian refugees in six vacant terraced houses at Kingston College in Mitchelstown, North Cork.

programme.title: Louis Theroux Interviews...
programme.desc: Louis meets Oscar-winning actress Dame Judi Dench. Having graced the stage and screen for over 60 years, including iconic turns as Queen Elizabeth in Shakespeare in Love and MI5 chief M in Bond, Judi is regarded as one of Britains greatest ever actors. Louis meets Judi at her home in Surrey for a candid and lively conversation about her long career, her passion for theatre and her life away from acting.

programme.title: Inside the Ambulance
programme.desc: West Midlands paramedics assess a man that the police have found acting erratically on a busy dual carriageway, the police believe he has taken the powerful psychoactive, Monkey Dust.

programme.desc: Shopping from home.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Shopping from home.

programme.title: Great Coastal Railway Journeys
programme.desc: Michael Portillo crosses the Severn Estuary to begin a new railway journey along the south coast of Wales. Eschewing the train through the 19th-century Severn Tunnel, he joins maintenance workers on a hair-raising secret railway.

programme.title: Great Coastal Railway Journeys
programme.desc: Michael Portillo continues his south Wales coastal railway journey in Barry Island, where he investigates `whats occurring at the busy docks. The waters upstream of the Barry Peninsula are tricky to navigate.

programme.title: Great Coastal Railway Journeys
programme.sub-title: Port Talbot to Pembrey Burry Port
programme.desc: Michael Portillos rail adventure along the south coast of Wales reaches the town of Port Talbot, known across the world for its steel production. He marvels as tons of molten iron are poured into railway wagons for transport to the steel plant.

programme.title: Great Coastal Railway Journeys
programme.desc: Michael Portillo travels the breathtaking rural coastline of Carmarthenshire and Pembrokeshire in south Wales. From Carmarthen Bay, he tracks up the estuary and River Towy to the historic town of Carmarthen and Middleton Hall.

programme.title: Bangers and Cash
programme.desc: Paul is off to the Lake District for a poignant collection from a Mathewsons regular - with seven vehicles to load including a Thames Truck, a Zodiac and a Vauxhall Victor.

programme.title: Bangers and Cash
programme.desc: Dereks running late as usual, to collect a Triumph TR8 from Kirby Stephen East Railway Station, with vintage engine ride thrown in for good measure.

programme.title: The World at War
programme.desc: A documentary series that gives a historical account of the events of World War II, from its roots in the 1920s to the aftermath and the lives it profoundly influenced.

programme.title: True Evil: Making of a Nazi
programme.desc: Adolf Eichmann, the talented bureaucratic civil servant, whose robotic willingness to follow orders leads him to design the system that would bring about the holocaust.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Fiona Bruce makes a surprising entrance to the show when she tries out the Eden Projects famous zipline, and she finds out how a former china clay pit was repurposed as an ecological conservation project. Justin Croft is privileged to get up close with items belonging to some of Britains greatest poets, including unusual keepsakes such as fragments of hair from Samuel Taylor Coleridge, while Will Farmer falls for a stylish, decorative ceramic panel by a 1960s Finnish designer.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: The roadshow is at Sefton Park in Liverpool, where treasures include 2,000-year-old cufflinks, a letter from Kate Bush, a portrait from the English Civil War and an early version of the Beatles logo made for a drum kit.

programme.title: Bangers and Cash: Restoring Classics
programme.desc: The teams first purchase is a 1972 VW Fastback, and the second project sees them pick up a 40-year-old police bike.

programme.title: Bangers and Cash: Restoring Classics
programme.desc: The Bangers team cant believe their luck when a 1970s family-favourite, a Volvo 144, rolls through Mathewson with just 15,000 miles on the clock.

programme.title: The World at War
programme.desc: A documentary series that gives a historical account of the events of World War II, from its roots in the 1920s to the aftermath and the lives it profoundly influenced.

programme.title: True Evil: Making of a Nazi
programme.desc: Adolf Eichmann, the talented bureaucratic civil servant, whose robotic willingness to follow orders leads him to design the system that would bring about the holocaust.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Fiona Bruce makes a surprising entrance to the show when she tries out the Eden Projects famous zipline, and she finds out how a former china clay pit was repurposed as an ecological conservation project. Justin Croft is privileged to get up close with items belonging to some of Britains greatest poets, including unusual keepsakes such as fragments of hair from Samuel Taylor Coleridge, while Will Farmer falls for a stylish, decorative ceramic panel by a 1960s Finnish designer.

programme.title: Tropic of Cancer
programme.desc: Simon Reeve travels from the beautiful Pacific coast of Mexico, where he visits the luxurious holiday resorts of Baja California, before crossing the countrys rugged interior. The first stage of his journey ends in the Bahamas where he discovers the hidden menace on the beautiful coral reefs.

programme.title: Train Truckers
programme.desc: Zak and Alex face a four-day mission to deliver a pair of classic steam locomotives for an Autumn Steam Gala at the Mid Hants Railway in Hampshire.

programme.title: David Jasons Great British Inventions
programme.desc: Sir David finds out about the invention of the incandescent light bulb as he learns about the British innovations that have transformed our homes.

programme.title: Great Coastal Railway Journeys
programme.desc: Michael Portillo crosses the Severn Estuary to begin a new railway journey along the south coast of Wales. Eschewing the train through the 19th-century Severn Tunnel, he joins maintenance workers on a hair-raising secret railway.

programme.title: Great Coastal Railway Journeys
programme.desc: Michael Portillo continues his south Wales coastal railway journey in Barry Island, where he investigates `whats occurring at the busy docks. The waters upstream of the Barry Peninsula are tricky to navigate.

programme.title: Great Coastal Railway Journeys
programme.sub-title: Port Talbot to Pembrey Burry Port
programme.desc: Michael Portillos rail adventure along the south coast of Wales reaches the town of Port Talbot, known across the world for its steel production. He marvels as tons of molten iron are poured into railway wagons for transport to the steel plant.

programme.title: Great Coastal Railway Journeys
programme.desc: Michael Portillo travels the breathtaking rural coastline of Carmarthenshire and Pembrokeshire in south Wales. From Carmarthen Bay, he tracks up the estuary and River Towy to the historic town of Carmarthen and Middleton Hall.

programme.title: Bangers and Cash
programme.desc: Paul is off to the Lake District for a poignant collection from a Mathewsons regular - with seven vehicles to load including a Thames Truck, a Zodiac and a Vauxhall Victor.

programme.desc: Dereks running late as usual, to collect a Triumph TR8 from Kirby Stephen East Railway Station, with vintage engine ride thrown in for good measure.

programme.title: Great Coastal Railway Journeys
programme.desc: Michael Portillo reaches the most westerly station in Wales, Milford Haven, the biggest energy port in the United Kingdom. He then heads north, visiting Britains smallest city and its cathedral.

programme.title: Great Coastal Railway Journeys
programme.sub-title: North West and Isle of Man: Part 1

programme.title: Bangers and Cash
programme.desc: With his pooch Iris to navigate, Dereks off to Bradford to pick up a 1920s Cyclecar replica and an 1930 MGM race car thats been brought back to life following a nasty smash.

programme.title: Bangers and Cash
programme.desc: Jack and Amy are on a poignant trip to collect some motorbikes from a widow in the North East of England.

programme.title: World at War
programme.desc: While Bomber Command are unable to hit their targets precisely and begin bombing German cities under cover of darkness, the Americans reinforce the daytime attacks.

programme.title: True Evil: Making of a Nazi
programme.desc: Hermann Goering, the dashing young war veteran down on his luck, who turns into an extravagant, heartless, obese, drug-addled Nazi billionaire.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: The roadshow returns to one of the grandest houses in Wales, Powis Castle. Mark Hill is intrigued by a ventriloquists dummy with an unusual hairpiece, while Geoffrey Munn is amazed to discover a love token crafted from a swans feather woven with gold that has survived for over 300 years.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: A look back through the archives at some of the most intriguing artefacts with royal connections that have appeared on the programme. Fiona Bruce gets a peek inside Westminster Abbey where coronation preparations are in full swing, while the team see brand new items with links to royalty in the stunning grounds of Fulham Palace.

programme.title: Bangers and Cash: Restoring Classics
programme.desc: The team fall for a Subaru Pick-up, which has all the Mathewsons in agreement. But will it all come crashing down when picking up parts proves tricky?

programme.desc: A 1973 Ford Escort Mexico is the teams most expensive purchase to date. To save some cash Derek helps on their second buy - a 1968 Riley Kestrel.

programme.title: Yuvraaj

programme.title: Alone
